agent: speckit.specify
# MealCraft Specification

## Project Overview

MealCraft is a recipe management application built for culinary enthusiasts who want to organize, store, and manage recipes online.

The application provides user account management, recipe CRUD functionality, recipe organization, and automatic shopping list generation based on selected recipes.

The initial release focuses on recipe creation, editing, viewing, and deletion. Users can register for an account and maintain a personalized collection of recipes for future use.

---

## Target Audience

Primary Audience:
- Culinary enthusiasts
- Home cooks
- Individuals with large recipe collections

---

## Goals

1. Allow users to create accounts and securely save recipes.
2. Allow users to organize and manage recipe collections.
3. Provide recipe CRUD functionality.
4. Generate shopping lists from selected recipes.
5. Provide a clean and intuitive user experience.

---

## Functional Requirements

### Authentication

Users must be able to:

- Register an account
- Sign in
- Sign out
- Manage profile information

### Recipe Management

Users must be able to:

- Create recipes
- View recipes
- Update recipes
- Delete recipes

### Recipe Information

Recipes should include:

- Recipe title
- Description
- Ingredients list
- Instructions
- Preparation time
- Servings
- Category

### Shopping List

Users must be able to:

- Select recipes
- Generate a shopping list
- View combined ingredients

---

## Success Criteria

- Users can create accounts successfully.
- Users can create recipes successfully.
- Users can edit recipes successfully.
- Users can delete recipes successfully.
- Users can generate shopping lists from recipes.
- Application meets all WDD430 project requirements.
---
